## Historical LLMs — Research Summary

Yes, this is a real and active area. There are several distinct projects, ranging from rigorous academic work to hobbyist experiments.

---

### 1. Ranke-4B (University of Zurich)

**The most serious entry.** A family of 4B-parameter models trained *from scratch* (not fine-tuned) on 80B tokens of historical texts, with hard temporal cutoffs: 1913, 1929, 1933, 1939, and 1946. Bui...(truncated)
